ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee's residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the employee's residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the employee's residence */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "current_annual_salary" REAL /* Current annual salary of the employee */,
  "gross_pay_2017" REAL /* Total gross pay received in 2017 */,
  "overtime_pay_2017" REAL /* Total overtime pay received in 2017 */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the employee's position */,
  "under_filled" TEXT /* Indicates if the position is under-filled */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was first hired */,
  "separation_date" TEXT /* Date the employee separated from the organization */,
  "separation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the employee's separation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_title FOREIGN KEY ("position_title") REFERENCES positions ("position_title"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division under which the department operates */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position */,
  "assignment_category" TEXT /* Category of the assignment (e.g., Fulltime-Regular) */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job responsibilities */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the salary record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the salary record */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary for that year */,
  "overtime_pay" REAL /* Overtime pay for that year */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus received for that year */,
  "performance_raise" REAL /* Performance-based raise for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code" TEXT /* The zip code */,
  "zip_name" TEXT /* The name of the area corresponding to the zip code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City corresponding to the zip code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State corresponding to the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "overtime_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overtime record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the overtime was worked */,
  "overtime_hours" REAL /* Number of overtime hours worked */,
  "overtime_pay" REAL /* Pay received for overtime hours */,
  "overtime_reason" TEXT /* Reason for overtime (e.g., emergency, special event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overtime_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee receiving the promotion */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the promotion */,
  "new_position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new position after promotion */,
  "promotion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for promotion (e.g., performance, vacancy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget allocation */,
  "allocated_budget" REAL /* Allocated budget amount for that year */,
  "spent_budget" REAL /* Amount spent from the allocated budget */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Number of hours worked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee taking the training */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of training completion */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_openings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job opening */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department hiring */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position open for recruitment */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the job opening was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job opening (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "number_of_applicants" INTEGER /* Number of applicants for the job opening */,
  "number_of_positions" INTEGER /* Number of positions available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_openings_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "overall_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the employee's performance */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee with the skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency in the skill (e.g., beginner, expert) */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the skill was certified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_skills_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee with the education background */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_education_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee with the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, dental, vision) */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit coverage starts */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit coverage ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
